summary: Backend refactoring verification COMPLETE. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend login flow and Daily Sessions page working correctly. The monolithic server.py (3952 lines) was successfully split into modular structure without breaking any functionality.

minor.issue: Health endpoint at app root level returns frontend HTML due to K8s routing - not accessible as API endpoint

auth_endpoints.POST_api_auth_login: PASS - Login with admin@crowd.sa/admin123 returns token and user info

dashboard_endpoints.GET_api_dashboard_stats: PASS - Returns crowd stats: total_visitors, current_crowd, open_gates etc.
dashboard_endpoints.GET_api_dashboard_departments: PASS - Returns 5 departments: planning, plazas, gates, crowd_services, mataf

settings_endpoints.GET_api_settings_login_page: PASS - Returns login page settings (site_name_ar, primary_color etc.)

sessions_endpoints.GET_api_map_sessions_limit_3: PASS - Returns max 3 sessions with limit param

transactions_endpoints.GET_api_transactions_stats: PASS - Returns transaction stats: total, completed, pending, in_progress

frontend_tests.login_page_loads: PASS - Login form with email/password inputs renders
frontend_tests.dashboard_renders: PASS - Dashboard shows stats cards, department cards, sidebar
frontend_tests.daily_sessions_session_list: PASS - Shows existing sessions (19 Feb, 18 Feb)

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully split server.py from 3952 lines into modular files
database.py (7 lines) - Clean MongoDB connection setup
auth.py (87 lines) - JWT handling, password hashing, user dependency functions
models.py (747 lines) - All Pydantic models properly organized
Route files under /routes/ properly import shared functions from auth.py and database.py
All API endpoints prefixed with /api work correctly after refactoring

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login flow and Daily Sessions page working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring tested successfully in iteration 22. The monolithic server.py was split into database.py, auth.py, models.py and 9 route files. All endpoints work as before. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_backend.py covers auth, dashboard, settings, maps, sessions, employees, transactions, and admin endpoints. Frontend login and daily sessions page verified working.
